history.text: First Paréage set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Andorra became independent from the Kingdom of France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Andorra became independent from the Principality of Catalonia, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Andorra became independent from the French Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
A constitution set out Andorra's basic framework of government.
